zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多整理结构
zh.content:
ADA/USD当前处于窄幅震荡整理，价格运行在0.1545-0.1578区间，日内小幅下跌0.28%，整体仍站稳20日均线之上，趋势偏震荡略多  

MACD柱值0.0023显示动能仍偏正，但信号线缺失导致判断有限；价格依托20日均线向上震荡，短期动能略有减弱但未转弱结构保持  

下方支撑关注0.1545与0.1491（20日均线），若失守可能回踩0.148附近；上方阻力位于0.1578及0.160整数关口，突破需放量确认  

交易建议以区间操作为主，低位接近0.1545可轻仓试多，高位0.1578附近逢高减仓或短空，止损控制在0.153下方，等待突破确认再顺势加仓

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is trading around 0.155035 after a slight 0.28% decline, reflecting mild consolidation rather than a decisive directional move. The pair continues to respect a short-term upward bias, as price holds above the 20-period SMA at 0.14914. Despite this, momentum has slowed following rejection near the recent high of 0.15779. Overall structure suggests a range-bound market with a cautious bullish undertone. Volume conditions appear moderate, indicating limited conviction from either side.

MACD at 0.0023180800 indicates emerging bullish momentum, though the absence of a confirmed signal line reading limits full validation of trend strength. Price trading above the 20-period SMA reinforces a supportive short-term structure. With RSI unavailable, momentum assessment relies primarily on MACD and price action. The market is showing gradual upward pressure but lacks strong breakout confirmation, suggesting cautious optimism among traders.

Immediate support is located near 0.154512, aligning closely with the recent session low, followed by stronger structural support at 0.14914, which corresponds to the 20-period SMA. On the upside, resistance is seen at 0.15779, where recent rejection occurred, with a break above this level opening path toward the psychological 0.1600 area. Price action remains compressed, indicating a potential breakout setup forming.

Short-term traders may consider range-bound strategies, buying near support around 0.1545 while targeting resistance near 0.1578. Stops can be placed below 0.1491 to manage downside risk. A breakout above 0.15779 would signal continuation toward 0.1600, making momentum entries more favorable. Conversely, failure to hold 0.1545 could trigger deeper retracement, so risk management remains essential in current low-volatility conditions environment persists.
